title: spec.hostname in Pod Yaml is not properly applied
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

`spec.hostname` applied via `podman play kube test-this.yml` is not properly applied.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

* create pod, specify hostname to be different than pod name
``` sh
tee test-this.yml <<< 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: mypod123
spec:
  hostname: test456
  containers:
  - name: first
    image: [docker.io/library/debian:bookworm](http://docker.io/library/debian:bookworm)
    command: ["/bin/sleep"]
    args:
    - "infinity"
  - name: second
    image: [docker.io/library/debian:bullseye](http://docker.io/library/debian:bullseye)
    command: ["/bin/sleep"]
    args:
    - "infinity"
  - name: third
    image: [docker.io/library/ubuntu:focal](http://docker.io/library/ubuntu:focal)
    command: ["/bin/sleep"]
    args:
    - "infinity"'

podman play kube test-this.yml
```

**Describe the results you received:**

* `/etc/hostname` was changed - that's OK

`podman exec mypod123-first cat /etc/hostname`

`test456`

* but the current hostname is still the default one (pod name)

`podman exec mypod123-first hostname`

`mypod123`

**Describe the results you expected:**

`hostname` should return the same value as `cat /etc/hostname`

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

Always

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.4.4
API Version:  3.4.4
Go Version:   go1.17.5
Built:        Thu Jan  1 00:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

AWS and physical

comments.body:
When I try to run your test, I get
$ podman play kube test-this.yml
Error: multi doc yaml could not be split: yaml: line 7: did not find expected key

The image URLs were converted to markdown URL for some reason...

Please try again:

``` sh
curl -s https://gist.githubusercontent.com/rudolfvesely/d59949e67410da889498ac4b9088a5e6/raw/7bb8f99298d688bd9fcf4635b0f9201a0d09a828/pod.yml > test-this.yml

podman play kube test-this.yml
```

This seems to be fixed on the main branch:
I added some [debug output on tag v3.4.4](https://github.com/hown3d/podman/commit/fcf0b4f381b948097eeab8b9973e6055e7473a51), which was used by @rudolfvesely .

The debug output logs:
```
# This is the sandbox container
WARN[0006] using hostname: mypod123                     
WARN[0006] found uts, setting hostname to : mypod123    
WARN[0006] HOSTNAME env var already present
# These are the pod containers             
WARN[0006] using hostname: test456                      
WARN[0006] found uts, setting hostname to : test456     
WARN[0006] adding hostname test456 to process env       
WARN[0006] using hostname: test456                      
WARN[0006] found uts, setting hostname to : test456     
WARN[0006] adding hostname test456 to process env       
WARN[0006] using hostname: test456                      
WARN[0006] found uts, setting hostname to : test456     
WARN[0006] adding hostname test456 to process env       
```

 which creates the sandbox image with the following json when running `podman inspect` of the sandbox container:
```json
[
    {
        "Path": "/pause",
        "Args": [
            "/pause"
        ],
        ...
        "IsInfra": false,
        ...
        "ImageName": "k8s.gcr.io/pause:3.5",
        ...
        "Config": {
        ...
            "Hostname": "mypod123",
            "Env": [
                "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin",
                "TERM=xterm",
                "container=podman",
                "HOSTNAME=mypod123" # hostname is set to the podname
            ],
            "Image": "k8s.gcr.io/pause:3.5",
           ...
       
        "CreateCommand": [
                "./bin/podman",
                "play",
                "kube",
                "test-this.yml"
            ],
        }
    }
]
```

By running `podman inspect` on one of the created containers of the pod, I recieve:
```json
{
  "Hostname": "test456",
   ...
  "Env": [
    "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin",
    "TERM=xterm",
    "container=podman",
    "HOME=/root",
    "HOSTNAME=mypod123"
  ],
  "Cmd": [
    "infinity"
  ],
  "Image": "docker.io/library/debian:bookworm",
  "Entrypoint": "/bin/sleep",
  ...
}
```

-> The HOSTNAME env var is set to the pod name in all containers of the pod.

On the [main branch with the same debug lines](https://github.com/hown3d/podman/commit/6f9632fd81a7ae70864de1f0d213a3a55f7f72cc), I get the following output:
```
# Sandbox Container
WARN[0005] using hostname: test456                      
WARN[0005] found uts, setting hostname to : test456     
WARN[0005] HOSTNAME env var already present       
# Pod Containers      
WARN[0005] using hostname: test456                      
WARN[0005] found uts, setting hostname to : test456     
WARN[0005] adding hostname test456 to process env       
WARN[0006] using hostname: test456                      
WARN[0006] found uts, setting hostname to : test456     
WARN[0006] adding hostname test456 to process env       
WARN[0006] using hostname: test456                      
WARN[0006] found uts, setting hostname to : test456     
WARN[0006] adding hostname test456 to process env       
```

podman inspect of sandbox container:
```json
[
    {
        "Path": "/catatonit",
        "Args": [
            "-P"
        ],
        "ImageName": "localhost/podman-pause:4.0.0-dev-1644453065",
        ...
        "IsInfra": true,  # not sure why this is different here
        "Config": {
            "Hostname": "test456",
            "Env": [
                "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin",
                "TERM=xterm",
                "container=podman",
                "HOSTNAME=test456" # hostname is set correctly
            ],
            "Image": "localhost/podman-pause:4.0.0-dev-1644453065",
            ...
            "Entrypoint": "/catatonit -P",
           ...
            "CreateCommand": [
                "./bin/podman",
                "play",
                "kube",
                "test-this.yml"
            ],
            ...
    }
]
```

By running `podman inspect` on one of the created containers of the pod, I recieve:
```json
{
  "Hostname": "test456",
  ...
  "Env": [
    "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin",
    "HOME=/root",
    "HOSTNAME=test456"
  ],
  "Cmd": [
    "infinity"
  ],
  "Image": "docker.io/library/debian:bookworm",
  ...
}
```
@rudolfvesely Please test against podman 4.0 or the main branch.
